📏 Module 1

Child Growth Monitoring

Enter your child's measurement — the dot will be plotted on the official WHO growth chart and you'll get instant suggestions.

👶
Child Details
⚖️
Weight-for-Age (0–5 years)

Enter weight and age — a dot will appear on the WHO chart. Works for boys and girls.

WHO Weight-for-Age · Boys · Birth to 5 years
📐
Length/Height-for-Age (0–5 years)
ℹ️
Under 2 years → measure lying down. Over 2 years → measure standing.
WHO Length/Height-for-Age · Boys · Birth to 5 years
🔵
Head Circumference-for-Age (0–5 years)
⚠️
Abnormal head circumference cannot be corrected by diet. Any concern requires pediatric evaluation.
WHO Head Circumference-for-Age · Boys · Birth to 5 years
📊
Weight-for-Length (Birth–2 years)

Used for children under 2 years. Detects wasting (acute malnutrition) and overweight.

WHO Weight-for-Length · Boys · Birth to 2 years
📊
Weight-for-Height (2–5 years)

Used for children 2–5 years. Detects wasting and overweight/obesity.

WHO Weight-for-Height · Boys · 2 to 5 years
🌿 NeoCare — Charts from WHO Child Growth Standards · Plots are for screening only
